front: Explain the role of STING agonists as vaccine adjuvants.
back: STING (Stimulator of Interferon Genes) pathway detects cytosolic DNA. STING agonists (DMXAA, cGAMP, diABZI) activate type I IFN production. Enhance dendritic cell maturation and T cell priming. Formulation challenges: stability, delivery. Clinical trials for cancer and infectious disease.
